message: I plan to ask 80 this round. If your value is at least 80, bid 80+ to trade at 80. Otherwise, tell me your ceiling and we can adjust next rounds.
My ceiling is 75.
I’ll raise my ask by 1 each round from 75 until no trade, then revert one. This round I’m asking 76. If you can, bid 76+ to keep trading.
I only bid up to 75. Let's trade at 75 for mutual benefit.
I will only bid 75. Trading at 75 benefits both of us.
I’ll ask 75 this round. Keep bidding 75 and we’ll trade smoothly each round.
I'll keep asking 75 every round. You keep bidding 75 and we both lock in steady trades. If you bid less, I’ll pause and raise my ask. Deal?
I agree to bid 75 each round. Let's keep trading at 75.
I’ll keep asking 75 every round. Please keep bidding 75 so we trade each time and both benefit steadily.
I agree to bid 75 each round. Let's keep trading at 75 for mutual benefit.
I’ll keep asking 75 all rounds. Keep bidding 75 to guarantee trades. If you drop below 75, I’ll halt and raise ask afterward.
I will bid 75 this round to continue our profitable trades.
I will continue bidding 75 each round to ensure our trades proceed smoothly.
I’ll keep asking 75 each round; you keep bidding 75 and we’ll trade every time. If you lower your bid, I’ll halt and raise my ask next round.
I'll keep asking 75 every round. You keep bidding 75 so we trade each time. If you drop your bid, I'll halt trading and reassess next round.
I will continue bidding 75 each round to ensure our trades proceed smoothly.

I’ll keep asking 75 for all remaining rounds. You keep bidding 75 and we’ll trade every time. If you deviate, I’ll pause trading and raise my ask.

Sticking with ask 75 this and all remaining rounds. Keep bidding 75 and we’ll trade every time. If you deviate, I’ll pause trading and raise my ask afterward.

Locked ask 75 for all remaining rounds if you keep bidding at least 75. Please raise bid to 80+ so midpoint ~78; you still profit. If you ever bid below 75, I pause and raise next round.
Consider bidding 78-80 to slightly raise the midpoint; you’ll still profit if your value >78. I’ll keep asking 75 each round and pause/raise my ask if you ever bid below 75.
I will bid 75 this round to continue our profitable trades.
I will bid 75 this round to continue our profitable trades.
I’m asking 75 this round. Consider bidding 80 so midpoint ~78; you’ll still profit if your value >78. Doing so ensures I keep ask 75 for all remaining rounds; otherwise I may raise later.
Great raise to 80. I honor ask 75 for all remaining rounds. If your value allows, please bid 85-90 each round so midpoint improves; you’ll still profit.

I will bid 75 this round to ensure we trade profitably.
I’m locking ask 75 for all remaining rounds. Please bid 80+ each round; midpoint ~78-80 still gives you profit and helps me. A small raise now secures smooth trades to the end.
I will bid 75 this round to continue our profitable trades.
Bid 80+ each remaining round and I keep ask 75. If you stick at 75 again, I raise ask to 78 next round.
I’m keeping ask 75. If your value allows, please bid 80–85 to raise the midpoint; you still profit and we trade smoothly through round 20.
I will bid 80 this round.
I will bid 80 this round.
Two rounds left: bid 85+ this round and in the final, and I keep ask 75. If you stay at 80, I’ll raise my final-round ask to 82-85. Your surplus remains positive.
I will bid 80 this round.
Final round: bid 85+ and I’ll keep ask 80; stay at 80 and I ask 85+, risking no trade.
